cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Claude Sonnet 4.7 vs GPT-5.5 for Salesforce Agents'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Claude Sonnet 4.7' (soft green/blue, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'strong instruction following', 'safe long-context case reasoning', 'predictable Salesforce tool orchestration' each with small icon. Central flow diagram showing Account, Case, Knowledge, Data Cloud Vector Search routed through an Agentforce 2.0 action. RIGHT COLUMN 'GPT-5.5' (soft blue/purple, bright blue header box): blocks for 'broad reasoning', 'fast agent planning', 'excellent structured JSON outputs'. Central glowing node 'Model Router' with clean straight lines to Agentforce Topic, Apex v64.0 Action, LWC Console. Speedometer labeled LATENCY pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Salesforce Agent Model Fit: Claude Sonnet 4.7 vs GPT-5.5'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Claude Sonnet 4.7' (soft green/blue, bold blue-grey header box): blocks for 'Case escalation rules', 'Knowledge-grounded email drafts', 'Compliance review summaries' each with small shield or document icon. Central flow diagram showing Case, Entitlement, Knowledge Article, Data Cloud Vector Search feeding into Agentforce 2.0 Service Agent. RIGHT COLUMN 'GPT-5.5' (soft blue/purple, bright blue header box): blocks for 'Lead enrichment orchestration', 'Opportunity update planning', 'JSON payload transformation'. Central glowing node 'Agent Planner' with clean lines to Salesforce API v64.0, ERP API, Marketing API. Speedometer labeled TOOL SPEED pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy/teal/blue palette on light blue-grey background.

System architecture diagram: 'Routed Salesforce Agent Architecture for Claude Sonnet 4.7 and GPT-5.5'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Routed Salesforce Agent Architecture'. Subtitle 'Agentforce 2.0 + Data Cloud Vector Search + Model Router + Salesforce API v64.0'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Salesforce Experience' (pastel blue): modules 'Service Console LWC Native State', 'Experience Cloud Chat', 'Agentforce Topic'. LAYER 2 'Grounding and Policy' (pastel green): modules 'Case + Entitlement', 'Knowledge Articles', 'Data Cloud Vector Search'. LAYER 3 'Model Routing' (pastel purple): modules 'Claude Sonnet 4.7 for Policy Tasks', 'GPT-5.5 for Orchestration'. Central node 'Task Classifier' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Apex Actions v64.0' and 'External ERP API'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Audit and Governance': sub-modules 'Prompt Version', 'Retrieved Context IDs', 'Human Approval' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
